title: Present Perfect
description: Connect the past to the present with have/has + past participle
summary_pt_br: Present perfect — have/has + particípio passado, conectando passado e presente.

exercises.question: I ___ to Rio three times.
exercises.explanation: Experiences: have + past participle. 'Been' is the participle of 'be'.
exercises.hint_pt_br: Para experiências de vida, use 'have/has' + particípio passado.

exercises.question: She ___ (just/finish) her homework.
exercises.explanation: Recent completion — 'just' sits between 'has' and the participle.
exercises.hint_pt_br: 'Just' fica entre 'has' e o particípio para ações recém-terminadas.

pairs: I have lived here for 5 years
exercises.explanation: Note: in Portuguese these are often present-tense; in English we use present perfect.
exercises.hint_pt_br: No português muitas vezes é presente; no inglês usamos present perfect.
